common_params.name: partner_id
common_params.description: Partner ID is assigned upon registration is successful. Required for all requests.

common_params.name: timestamp
common_params.description: This is to indicate the timestamp of the request. Required for all requests. Expires in 5 minutes.

common_params.name: sign
common_params.description: Signature generated by partner_id, api path, timestamp and partner_key via HMAC-SHA256 hashing algorithm. More details: https://open.shopee.com/documents?module=87&type=2&id=58&version=2

define: Use this API to refresh the access_token after it expires. Refresh_token can be used once only, this API will also return a new refresh_token. Please use the new refresh_token for the next RefreshAccessToken call

request_params.name: refresh_token
request_params.description: Use refresh_token to get a new access_token. Each refresh_token is valid for 30 days, and can only be used once by either a shop_id or merchant_id or supplier_id or user_id.

request_params.name: partner_id
request_params.description: The partner_id obtained from the App. This partner_id is inserted into the body.

request_params.name: shop_id
request_params.description: The shop_id that granted authorization to your App. Only the shop_id or merchant_id or supplier_id or user_id can be selected as the input parameter, and they must be refreshed separately.

request_params.name: merchant_id
request_params.description: The merchant_id that granted authorization to your App. Only the shop_id or merchant_id or supplier_id or user_id can be selected as the input parameter, and they must be refreshed separately.
The supplier_id that granted authorization to your App. Only the shop_id or merchant_id or supplier_id or user_id can be selected as the input parameter, and they must be refreshed separately.
request_params.name: supplier_id

request_params.description: The user_id that granted authorization to your App. Only the shop_id or merchant_id or supplier_id or user_id can be selected as the input parameter, and they must be refreshed separately.
request_params.name: user_id

response_params.description: Indicate error type if hit error. Empty if no error happened.
Indicate error details if hit error. Empty if no error happened.

request_id
response_params.description: The identifier for an API request for error tracking.

response_params.name: partner_id
response_params.description: Returned when the API call is successful. The partner_id you used for this refresh.

response_params.name: shop_id
response_params.description: Returned when the API call is successful. The shop_id for this refresh.

response_params.name: merchant_id
response_params.description: Returned when the API call is successful. The merchant_id for this refresh.
Returned when the API call is successful. The supplier_id for this refresh.
response_params.name: supplier_id

response_params.description: Returned when the API call is successful. The user_id for this refresh.
response_params.name: user_id
access_token
response_params.description: Returned when the API call is successful. Each new access_token is a dynamic token that can be used multiple times. It expires after 4 hours.

response_params.name: refresh_token
response_params.description: New refresh_tokenReturned when the API call is successful. Use a refresh_token to get a new access_token. Each refresh_token is valid for 30 days, and can only be used once by either a shop_id or merchant_id or supplier_id or user_id.

response_params.name: expire_in
response_params.description: Returned when the API call is successful. The validity period of the access_token, in seconds.

request_sample.value:
<?php

$curl = curl_init();

curl_setopt_array($curl, array(
  CURLOPT_URL => 'https://partner.shopeemobile.com/api/v2/auth/access_token/get?partner_id=partner_id&sign=sign&timestamp=timestamp',
  CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER => true,
  CURLOPT_ENCODING => '',
  CURLOPT_MAXREDIRS => 10,
  CURLOPT_TIMEOUT => 0,
  CURLOPT_FOLLOWLOCATION => true,
  CURLOPT_HTTP_VERSION => CURL_HTTP_VERSION_1_1,
  CURLOPT_CUSTOMREQUEST => 'POST',
  CURLOPT_POSTFIELDS => '{
    "partner_id": 2001887,
    "refresh_token": "4c7259534969484e71734d695a6e6d55",
    "shop_id": 322300222
}',
  CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER => array(
    'Content-Type: application/json'
  ),
));

$response = curl_exec($curl);

curl_close($curl);
echo $response;
